Title: SQL Exception on Login
Description: Steps to reproduce: Open login page, enter credentials, click login. Expected behavior: User logs in successfully. Error: DB timeout at AuthController.java:42

Title: Checkout Button Unresponsive
Description: Steps to reproduce: Add product to cart and click checkout. Expected behavior: Payment page should open. Actual behavior: Nothing happens when clicking checkout.

Title: PDF Export Corrupted
Description: Steps to reproduce: Generate monthly report and export as PDF. Expected behavior: Valid PDF should download. Actual behavior: Downloaded PDF cannot be opened.

Title: Application Crash After Multiple Failed Logins
Description: Steps to reproduce: Enter incorrect password 10 times continuously. Expected behavior: Error message and account lockout. Actual behavior: Application crashes unexpectedly.

Title: Duplicate Login Crash Report
Description: Steps to reproduce: Enter wrong password repeatedly during login attempts. Expected behavior: User receives warning messages. Actual behavior: Login page crashes after several failed attempts.

Title: User Profile Image Not Updating
Description: Steps to reproduce: Upload a new profile picture and save changes. Expected behavior: Updated image should be displayed. Actual behavior: Old image continues to appear after refresh.

Title: Payment Processed Twice
Description: Steps to reproduce: Double-click the Pay Now button during checkout. Expected behavior: Single payment transaction. Actual behavior: Customer account charged twice.

Title: Password Reset Email Not Received
Description: Steps to reproduce: Click Forgot Password and submit registered email. Expected behavior: Reset email should arrive within a few minutes. Actual behavior: No email received after 30 minutes.

Title: Dashboard Loads Extremely Slowly
Description: Steps to reproduce: Login and navigate to dashboard containing more than 500 records. Expected behavior: Dashboard loads within 5 seconds. Actual behavior: Dashboard takes over 45 seconds to load.

Title: Unauthorized Access to Admin Page
Description: Steps to reproduce: Modify browser URL from user dashboard to /admin. Expected behavior: Access denied message. Actual behavior: User can access admin controls without authorization.
